headline: Costco just dropped a trendy bakery item members already love
summary: If you've ever walked into Costco and had that "a ha" moment when you spot a new product you know you're going to adore, you're not alone. Costco has built a retail empire not just on bulk pricing, but on its ability to keep shoppers coming back for new and interesting finds. The warehouse giant is ...

headline: Will Costco’s Membership Resilience and Value Strategy Shift Costco Wholesale's (COST) Investment Narrative?
summary: In recent months, Costco Wholesale has reported resilient performance powered by high membership renewal rates, rising executive memberships, new prepared-meal offerings, and value-focused pricing such as holding its iconic US$1.50 hot dog combo steady while adding a bottled water option. At the same time, developments like Vanguard’s large passive stake and lawsuits over potential tariff refunds highlight how Costco’s member-first model and pricing choices are drawing attention from both...

headline: Gas prices are high right now. Use these 6 tools to save on fuel
